home.heroBadge: Script engine is live right here · no sign-in needed
home.heroTitle:
Type an idea.

Get a video with a real Vietnamese voice.
home.heroSub: Ads, KOLs, trends, short films or storytelling — Vyra writes a timecoded script, adds one of 7 real Vietnamese voices, then builds a 60-second video. Try it right beside this — no account required.
home.useCasesTitle: Not just ads. <grad>Vyra builds every kind of video.</grad>
home.useCasesSub: AI KOL reviews, trends, short films, storytelling, lookbooks, unboxings, testimonials... same workflow, same real Vietnamese voice.
home.manifestoEyebrow: Enter an idea · Pick a voice · Get a video
home.manifestoBody: No gear, no crew, no shoot schedule. You bring the idea — ads, KOLs, trends, short films or storytelling — Vyra handles the script, a real Vietnamese voice, frame-synced captions and a 60-second build.
home.compareTitle: The same video. <grad>The difference is a real Vietnamese voice.</grad>
home.compareRow_captions_vyra: Timing from the script, zero errors
home.faq_what_a: Vyra is a platform that creates every kind of video with AI and a real Vietnamese voice — ads, KOLs, trends, short films, storytelling. Vyra writes the script, adds the voiceover, builds the captions and renders the video, with no camera or crew needed.
home.faq_noskill_q: Can I use it if I don't know how to edit video?
home.faq_noskill_a: Yes. Just upload one image (or paste a marketplace link for Vyra to parse), pick an angle and a voice, and Vyra handles the rest. Four steps, about 60 seconds.
home.faq_voice_q: Does the voice sound as natural as a real person?
home.faq_voice_a: There are 7 distinctive Vietnamese voices (Mai, Linh, Trang, Bong, Khoa, Hung, Tu) — youthful, gentle, warm, witty. You can preview each one in the app before creating.
home.faq_cost_a: You pay with credits and see the credit cost of each video before creating it. Sign up to get 300 free credits, no card required. You're only charged on use, with a 100% refund on system errors.
home.faq_refund_q: Do I get a refund on system errors?
home.faq_refund_a: Yes. Vyra only holds credits while creating and charges only for what you use; if a render fails due to a system error, you get a 100% refund.
home.faq_watermark_a: Paid plans export videos with no watermark. You can also export all 3 ratios: vertical 9:16, square 1:1, horizontal 16:9.
home.faq_types_q: What kinds of videos can Vyra build?
home.faq_types_a: Ads, AI KOL reviews, trends, short films, storytelling, lookbooks, unboxings, testimonials, product comparisons... same workflow, same real Vietnamese voice.
home.faq_api_q: Is there an API to integrate with my system?
home.faq_api_a: Yes. Vyra offers a B2B API (POST /api/v1/videos with X-API-Key) and a webhook that fires when a video is done, signed with HMAC for verification.
home.howTitle: Four steps. <grad>No video editing skills needed.</grad>
home.step_upload_t: Upload an image / paste a link
home.step_upload_d: Drag and drop an image, or paste a Shopee/TikTok Shop link for Vyra to pull the image, price and name.
home.step_pick_d: One of 6 conversion angles, one of 7 Vietnamese voices. Edit the script line by line.
home.step_render_d: Adds the voiceover, frame-synced captions, and exports all 3 ratios. About 60 seconds.
home.step_measure_d: Each variant gets its own short link. Track real clicks, rank them, and clone the one that sells.
home.reelLookbookNote: outfit stays consistent across every shot
home.reelTrendNote: built fast to ride the wave
home.s1Title: One engine. <grad>Every kind of video, made by AI.</grad>
home.s1Sub: The images below are sample frames for each content type. Same process, same real Vietnamese voice.
home.s1bHint: Hover over each sample to watch the clip play.
home.s2Title: Six capabilities. <grad>Every one runs right here</grad> for you to try.
home.s2Sub: Each tile runs live here. Click, drag, change it. These are not screenshots.
home.act1Title: Your product photo sits still. <grad>Vyra makes it speak Vietnamese.</grad>
home.act1Bullet2: Captions matched to the frame, timing taken from the script, not guessed by ASR
home.act1Bullet3: Export all 3 ratios: vertical 9:16 · square 1:1 · landscape 16:9
home.act2Eyebrow: · No Vietnamese rival does this yet
home.act2Title: Rivals make videos. <grad>Vyra finds the videos that drive orders.</grad>
home.act2Sub: Create many variants from one product → each gets its own short link → measure real clicks → rank them → duplicate the winner.
home.act4Title: Enter your product. <grad>Get a script by timecode.</grad> Edit it line by line.
home.act4Sub: Pick 1 of 6 persuasion angles. The engine returns a hook plus each beat by timecode, editable by hand before you build. Captions take their timing straight from the script.
home.act3Title: <grad>7 Vietnamese voices</grad> with personality. Each one has its own character.
home.act3Sub: Mai, Linh, Trang, Bống, Khoa, Hùng, Tú: youthful, gentle, warm, witty. Pick the voice that fits your category and preview it in the app.
home.act5Sub: Vertical 9:16 for TikTok/Reels, square 1:1 for the feed, landscape 16:9 for YouTube, all from the same build.
home.creditTitle: You always know the cost <grad>before</grad> you spend a credit.
home.creditBody: Vyra estimates up front, holds credits only temporarily, charges you for exactly what you use, and refunds 100% on a system error. No silent charges behind your back.
home.creditItem1Desc: See roughly how many credits before you create.
home.creditItem2Desc: Hold the maximum, charge only for what you use.
home.creditItem3Desc: A system error means a 100% refund, no wrongful charge.
home.ctaTitle: Stop guessing which video drives orders. <grad>Let the data tell you.</grad>
home.ctaSub: Get 300 free credits, no card needed. 7 real Vietnamese voices. No watermark on paid plans.
home.ctaButton: Create your first batch of videos
home.ctaHint: It takes about 60 seconds to get your first video.
home.footerCopyright: © 2026 Vyra · AI video with real Vietnamese voices
home.introTagline: Create any kind of video with AI · real Vietnamese voices

reports.heroSubtitle: Every number here comes straight from your credit ledger and videos. No estimates.

account.desc: The identity and workspace you are signed in to.

profile.desc: The name shown in your workspace and on videos.

security.desc: Changing your password signs out all other sessions.

studio.desc: The default applied each time you create a new video.

workspace.desc: Invite collaborators and manage your brand kits.
workspace.membersDesc: Invite collaborators to make videos together.

developer.desc: Call the Vyra engine from code and get a webhook when a video is done.
developer.apiDesc: Create API keys and register webhooks that fire when a render finishes.

brandkits.heroTitle: One brand kit, <grad>applied to every video</grad>
brandkits.heroSubtitle: Logo, primary & secondary colors, font, watermark, and disclosure line. Set one as default so every video carries the same look.
brandkits.emptyPaletteHint: Create your first kit to see a live palette
brandkits.emptyBody: Create your first kit to add a logo & watermark to videos. Each kit is one palette, one font, and one disclosure line.

apipage.heroTitle: Create videos with <grad>a few lines of code</grad>
apipage.heroDesc: One POST call queues a video build. Vyra notifies your webhook when it's done. No dashboard needed, plug it straight into your sales system.
apipage.keyOnceWarning: Save it now — the key is shown only this once:
apipage.keysEmpty: No keys yet. Create your first key to call the API.
apipage.webhookDesc: When a video is done (READY/FAILED), Vyra calls your URL. The payload is HMAC-signed via the header.
apipage.secretOnceWarning: Secret to verify the signature — shown only once:

billing.step1Note: Pay once, spend over time. Bigger packs cost less per credit.
billing.step2Note: Each job holds credits temporarily, charges only what it uses, and refunds the rest.
billing.step3Note: Every top-up, hold, use, and refund is recorded, with the remaining balance.
billing.viewHeldAria: View held amounts in the ledger
billing.heldSub: From a running job. The extra is refunded when it finishes.
billing.capacityNote: estimated at ~150 credits/video; short videos cost less.
billing.trustProofSub: Holds the maximum, charges only what you use, and refunds 100% on a system error.
billing.qrDialogAria: Scan QR to top up credits
billing.creditedToWallet: Added {value} to your wallet. Balance updated.
billing.qrSub: Open your banking app → scan the code → transfer. The system credits automatically on receipt.
billing.transferAccurateNote: Transfer the exact amount and exact note to be credited automatically.
billing.emptyAll: No transactions yet. Every top-up, hold, use, and refund will show up here.
billing.ledgerFooter: Every hold, use, and refund is recorded. Never charged silently.
billing.qrExpired: Expired — close and create a new top-up

imagegen.heroSubtitle: Type an idea, AI builds the image. Use it as the opening frame for a video, or post it directly.
imagegen.emptyHint: Write a description on the right, then hit Generate. A few examples for inspiration:
imagegen.descPlaceholder: Example: a cup of coffee on a wooden table, cinematic lighting, purple-blue tones, high detail
imagegen.presetMilktea: A cup of bubble milk tea on a wooden table, warm lighting, bokeh background
imagegen.presetMilkteaShort: Bubble milk tea on a wooden table
imagegen.presetSerum: A skincare serum bottle on a pastel pink background, luxurious, close-up
imagegen.presetSerumShort: Skincare serum on a pastel pink background
imagegen.presetHeadphones: Bluetooth headphones on a stone pedestal, dark background, blue rim light
imagegen.presetHeadphonesShort: Bluetooth headphones on a stone pedestal
imagegen.presetJacket: A jacket styled on a mannequin, editorial look, studio lighting
imagegen.minWordsHint: You need at least a few words of description to generate.
imagegen.tipDescribe: Describe the SUBJECT + SCENE + LIGHTING for a sharp image that matches your intent.
imagegen.tipColorTone: Add a color tone (e.g. 'purple-blue tone') so the image fits your brand identity.
imagegen.tipVertical: Use a vertical 9:16 image as the opening frame, then build it into a video.

create.scriptTip: Tip: add a Gemini/Groq key for sharper AI-written scripts.

admin.noAccess: You don't have permission to access the admin page.

admin.heroSubtitle: Users, credits, and moderation in one place. Every config change applies instantly.

affiliate.heroTitle:
From a click in your video

to an order on the marketplace

affiliate.avgNote: Across {count} active links. Any link below this means the video's opening hook isn't strong enough.
affiliate.emptyDesc: Create your first short link in the panel on the left, then add it to your video description.

audio.title: Create <grad>AI audio</grad>

audio.example2: I tried it for a week and really like how light it feels.

audio.wavePlaceholder: Type a script to see the waveform

compose.heroDescription: Upload a few vertical photos, set the pace per frame, and Vyra stitches them into a smooth clip ready to post.
compose.addImageAria: Add an image to the bench
compose.error: Couldn't compose the clip, try again.
compose.tip1: Use 9:16 vertical photos so the clip has no black bars.
compose.tip2: 3-5 frames at 2-3 seconds each gives the smoothest pace.
compose.tip3: Want voice-over and a script? Use "Create video" instead.
compose.emptyDesc: Tap to pick photos — you need at least 2 to compose a clip.
